theme: Dark Mode Default with Green & Cyan Glow (Eco-Tech Apple-inspired)

headings.family: Cabinet Grotesk, Outfit, or General Sans

mono.usage: Code highlighting, token counts, metrics, terminal styles

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: High-end glass: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px inner border of white/10, subtle shadow
visual_enhancers.gradients: Used sparingly for text fills (bg-clip-text) and subtle glows behind cards. Not as massive flat backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.borders: Ultra-thin 1px solid white/5 or white/10. No thick borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows using colored shadows for primary buttons (e.g., emerald/20)
visual_enhancers.noise: Subtle grain overlay (opacity 2-5%) on dark backgrounds to prevent banding

layouts.landing: Full height 100vh hero sections. Bento grid for features. Absolute positioning for 3D elements behind glass overlays.
layouts.dashboard: Fixed sidebar, dense data layouts, grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 bento cards.
layouts.chat: Centered max-w-4xl container, sticky bottom input area, distinct user vs AI message bubbles with streaming typography effects.
layouts.spacing: p-8 to p-12 for major sections. gap-6 for bento grids.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary uses emerald-cyan gradient with glow. Secondary is glass (bg-white/5, border-white/10) with text-white hover:bg-white/10.
components.cards: Subtle rounded (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl), border-white/5, hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-emerald-500/30 transition-all duration-300.
components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs border border-emerald-500/20 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400

motion.framer_motion: Used for page transitions, card staggering, and smooth state changes.
motion.hover_states: Micro-interactions: scale up icons slightly, glow borders, lift cards.
motion.streaming: Typewriter effect for AI chat streaming.

3d_libraries.react-three-fiber: Used for 3D Earth rendering in hero section
3d_libraries.drei: Helpers for R3F to add environment and floating animations
3d_libraries.three-globe: Used to create the glowing blue-green globe with AI network connection lines and floating particles

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark earth view for background when 3D is loading
Abstract green light particles for dashboard accents
3D modern abstract shape with green/cyan hues for feature section backgrounds

logos.description: OpenAI logo for Model Recommendation Card

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA standard. Use white text over dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:outline-none on all interactive elements.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion using Tailwind motion-safe and motion-reduce.
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always specify properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, with interaction animations & context color.
NEVER use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Every interactive element MUST have data-testid in kebab-case.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Prioritize optical alignment over geometrical alignment.
Use layered shadows (ambient + direct) to create depth on dark mode.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds on headers or drop-downs over content.
Use grid-template-columns for dashboard density, with tight gaps and strict visual hierarchy.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement these guidelines rigidly. Use purely Tailwind classes for styling (e.g. backdrop-blur-xl). Integrate react-three-fiber for the 3D rotating earth in the Hero section. For gamification elements (confetti, badges), ensure smooth Framer Motion animations. Avoid default Bootstrap or Material looks; prioritize a custom, Apple-inspired minimal glass aesthetic.
